profile.verifyPhoneHint: Please verify your phone number to update it

passwordValidation.minLength: Password must be at least 8 characters long
passwordValidation.lowercase: Password must contain at least one lowercase letter
passwordValidation.uppercase: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter
passwordValidation.digit: Password must contain at least one digit

preferences.routineDescription: Adjust your daily rhythm, routine expectations, and reminder notifications.
preferences.emailDescription: Board tips, product updates, and app news by email.
preferences.dataTrainingDescription: Help improve the experience by allowing anonymized usage to be used for model training. Default is off.
preferences.planRemindersDescription: Default channels and text reminder setup for dates, goals and next steps from The Plan.
preferences.planRemindersButtonSubtitle: Email, calendar export and text nudges
preferences.boardRemindersPauseDescription: Stops email and text reminders across every board until you turn this back on.

deletion.heading: Delete account
deletion.scheduledPrefix: Your account is scheduled for deletion on
deletion.description: Permanently delete your account and all associated data. This cannot be undone and your data cannot be retrieved. Deletion is scheduled 30 days after you confirm.
deletion.confirm1Body: Your account and all associated data (profile, preferences, content) will be permanently deleted. You will not be able to retrieve or recover this data. This is a final decision. Do you want to continue?
deletion.confirm2Body: This is your last chance to cancel. Your account and all data will be permanently deleted and cannot be recovered. Are you sure you want to delete your account?
deletion.scheduledToast: Your account is scheduled for deletion on {{date}}. You can log in before then to cancel in Settings.

billing.billingDescription: Manage your subscription and payment methods
billing.portalHint: Opens the customer portal to update payment or cancel your subscription.
billing.trialActiveDescription: Board downloads unlock when your paid subscription starts. Start billing now to unlock them immediately.
billing.trialEndedNow: Subscription started — board downloads are unlocked.

routine.title: Routine reminders
routine.subtitle: Routine intensity and notifications
routine.intensityDescription: Adjust how often you want nudges and check-ins
routine.notificationsDescription: Notifications support your routine — they nudge you back to the app.
routine.deviceDeniedHint: Notifications are off at the device level. Your routine and boards will still work.

light.title: Light
light.description: A lighter rhythm with one daily notification if you opt in.

consistent.title: Consistent
consistent.description: A steadier rhythm with up to 2 daily notifications if selected.

locked_in.title: Locked In
locked_in.description: More frequent nudges with up to 3 daily notifications if selected.

toasts.codeSendFailed: Failed to send verification code. Please try again.
toasts.verifyPhoneFirst: Please verify your new phone number before updating
toasts.usernameTaken: Username is already taken. Please choose another.
toasts.usernameNotAllowed: That username is not available. Please choose another.
toasts.usernameValidationError: Could not check that username. Please try again.
toasts.loginRequired: Please log in to update preferences
toasts.deletionScheduled: Your account is scheduled for deletion on {{date}}. You can log in before then to cancel in Settings.
toasts.deletionFailed: Could not schedule account deletion. Please try again or contact support@paletteplotting.com.
toasts.deletionCancelled: Account deletion cancelled. Your account will not be deleted.
toasts.deletionCancelFailed: Could not cancel. Please try again or contact support@paletteplotting.com.
toasts.billingLoginRequired: Please log in to manage billing
toasts.iosSubscriptionsHint: Manage billing is available from your iPhone in Settings > Apple ID > Subscriptions.
toasts.portalFailed: Could not open billing portal. Please try again.
toasts.portalFailedFallback: Could not open billing portal. Please try again or use the link in your subscription email.
toasts.routineLoadFailed: Could not load your routine settings.
toasts.routineNotifDeniedIos: Notifications are off in iOS Settings. Enable them there, then try again.
toasts.routineIntensitySaveFailed: Could not save your routine intensity.
toasts.planRemindersLoadFailed: Could not load plan reminder preferences.
toasts.planRemindersSaveFailed: Could not save plan reminder preferences.
toasts.boardRemindersPauseFailed: Could not update board reminder pause

planReminders.title: Plan reminders
planReminders.subtitle: Defaults for The Plan — per-step choices on Action still apply
planReminders.channelsDescription: These are your account defaults. Each next step on Action can still choose its own channels before you finalize.
planReminders.channelSystemLine: Calendar = scheduled follow-through. Email = soft accountability. Text = stronger nudge.
planReminders.calendarHint: Calendar export is unlimited. Export from Action after you finalize a plan.
planReminders.smsDescription: Short stronger nudges for important next steps. Not marketing texts.
planReminders.smsDailyLimit: Up to 5 text reminders per day.
planReminders.phoneHint: Used only for text reminders you choose.
planReminders.phoneRequired: Add a phone number before turning on text reminders.
planReminders.phoneInvalid: Enter a valid U.S. phone number.
planReminders.consentRequired: Please agree to receive text reminders.
planReminders.smsConsentPrefix: I agree to receive recurring text reminders from Palette Plotting about plans and tasks I choose. Message frequency may vary. Standard message and data rates may apply. Reply STOP to opt out. Reply HELP for assistance. Your mobile information will not be sold or shared with third parties for promotional or marketing purposes. See
planReminders.proRequired: Text reminders require an active palette plotting plan.
planReminders.smsCharNote: Text reminders are short by design — {{max}} characters max per message.
planReminders.perStepNote: Tip: Open Action to set Calendar, Email or Text on individual next steps before finalizing.
